headline: Jim Cramer Discusses the Recent Performance and Earnings Result of Dow Inc.
summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Cramer noted that the stock declined even after reporting a good quarter because it was already up significantly for the year. When Iran shut down the Strait of Hormuz, that was terrible for the […]
